decision: Derive the app's default workspace basePath from the deploy instead of hardcoding ~/prj. Precedence: DAAX_DEFAULT_BASE_PATH > HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH(~-form) > ~/prj. Repo default stays ~/prj; galway auto-derives ~/jarvis from existing HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH with no committed value or deploy edit.
why: Honors 'only for this host' while keeping the PR host-agnostic. The container already mounts ~/jarvis->/workspace; only hardcoded ~/prj literals/labels were wrong.
files: lib/settings.ts (generalized expandPath container mapping via HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH; narrow migration of exact ~/prj default)
components/backlog/project-selector.tsx (workspace root label from basePath basename)
app/settings/page.tsx (placeholder + Default text use effective default)

validation.local: typecheck+lint(0 err)+format(clean on touched files)+vitest 1215 pass; host build ok; container rebuilt (daax:latest healthy); /api/config basePath=~/jarvis; /api/workspace ~/jarvis->/workspace 156 entries; ~/prj backward-compat ->/workspace; backlog store initialized from /workspace; code-server running
